name: Cubus
short_description: Descend through a series of endless falling cubes in this fast-paced game. Test your reflexes and timing as you navigate through tight spaces and avoid obstacles.
detailed_description:
Description

Descend through a series of endless falling cubes in this fast-paced game. Test your reflexes and timing as you navigate through tight spaces and avoid obstacles. Collect points from the rotating cubes that appear and see how far you can go.

Features

  • Simple and addictive gameplay
  • Basic controls
  • Endless procedurally generated levels

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Dutch, Japanese, Korean, Spanish - Latin America, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Turkish
